column1: They ______ (to listen) to music at the concert hall yesterday.
Fred and Helen ______ (to stay) at a hotel last June.
Bat _______ (to water) the flowers an hour ago.
She _______ (not to try) on a white dress at the shop yesterday.
They ________ (not to watch) squirrels in the park last Sunday.
Colin ________ (not to celebrate) his birthday last Monday.
______ your mother ______ (to cook) a cabbage soup for dinner yesterday?
______ you ______ (to copy) out a text yesterday evening?
_____ your brother _______ (to join) the army last autumn?
_______ Dave ______ on the stage yesterday evening?
